questions.question: For a discrete random variable X with probability mass function f(x) = 2x(1-x), find the mathematical expectation E(X).
If Y = 3X + 2, where X is a random variable with a uniform distribution on [0, 1], find E(Y).
A random variable X has the following probability distribution: P(X = 1) = 0.3, P(X = 2) = 0.2, P(X = 3) = 0.5. Find E(X).
